name: ExtensionAppointment_Replaces
title: R5: Appointment replaced by this Appointment (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.replaces` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.replaces` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Appointment)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.replaces` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Appointment)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.replaces` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.replaces` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Appointment replaced by this Appointment (new)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.replaces` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.replaces` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Appointment replaced by this Appointment in cases where there is a cancellation, the details of the cancellation can be found in the cancellationReason property (on the referenced resource).
